name: Almond Milk Rock 120g (Bulgarian Rock)
description:
Almond Milk Rock 120g (Bulgarian Rock)

Looking for something sweet, nutty, and a little different? Try the Almond Milk Rock (Bulgarian Rock)! This unique treat combines smooth milk chocolate with crunchy almonds, creating a delicious texture and flavour that’s hard to resist.

Each bite offers the perfect mix of creamy sweetness and nutty crunch, making it a delightful snack for any time of day. Whether you enjoy it with your coffee, share it with friends, or keep it all to yourself, this chocolatey treat is sure to hit the spot.

Bulgarian Rock is known for its rich, satisfying flavour and classic candy style. The 120g size is just right for treating yourself or gifting to someone who loves a good chocolate and nut combo. It’s a simple pleasure that delivers real taste and texture.

At Sweets World, we search the globe for tasty and interesting snacks to share with you—and Almond Milk Rock is one of those hidden gems. It's a lovely choice for anyone who enjoys a balance of smooth chocolate and roasted almonds in every bite.

Try it today and experience a little crunch, a little creaminess, and a whole lot of flavour—all in one tasty package!
